headline: A Look At Bunge Global (BG) Valuation After Strong Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Why Bunge Global (BG) is on investors’ radar today Bunge Global (BG) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$120.71. For investors, the key question is how this level lines up with fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Bunge Global. Recent price action has cooled slightly, with the 30 day share price return down 3.35%. However, the year to date share price return of 30.30% and 1 year total shareholder return of 58.91% still point to strong...
